title: Toji Kensuke and Hikari
wikitext:
[]: Toji, Kensuke, and Hikari [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by jayngfet » Mon Nov 09, 2009 9:10 pm So, it's time to get to the least used pilots in the series(one of whom was never even sorted with an EVA, despite one pic of her in a plugsuit). I'm wondering why they'd have been mentioned in rebuild then not used at all. It seems wierd to me that they do the whole of nothing so far, even less than their original roles! This is compounded by the fact that in a movie you have limited time, not so much to waste on things as in a 26 episode series(13 hours for Neon, 8 for rebuild that we've seen half of). Then I remembered we have no pilot for unit 08, and no mention of an 07. I'm wondering if they could have been sorted with these EVA's, this time actually joining as pilots able to fight the angels. Also, sorry if this is the wrong forum, new around here.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Nov 09, 2009 9:41 pm Aside from Toji not piloting Unit-03 I feel their roles are pretty the same as they were in the series. Just being supporting characters.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Nov 09, 2009 11:26 pm Toji piloted Unit 03, actually. And Kensuke and Hikari aren't pilots, and were never pilots. They're just potentials if they need spares, IE if Shinji and the others fucking DIE.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Mon Nov 09, 2009 11:34 pm We'll probably never see any of them again after 2.0, except maybe a shot of Toji and Kensuke's bodies being pulled from the rubble of Tokyo-3. Or evacuated, if they survived.

[]:             Quote Post by jayngfet » Tue Nov 10, 2009 1:21 am Actually every time Gainax needs a pikot they pull out Kensuke for 04, meaning at some point he WAS chosen, and the rules seem different if Asuka can make 03 work and Mari 02, and hey, at least one EVA we know nothing about, and 07 is MIA. The next two pilots to be chosen and next two EVA's, seems natural to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Nov 10, 2009 7:19 am We'll have to wait and see dude.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Nov 10, 2009 8:02 am Lucretius wrote: We'll probably never see any of them again after 2.0, except maybe a shot of Toji and Kensuke's bodies being pulled from the rubble of Tokyo-3. Or evacuated, if they survived.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Nov 10, 2009 10:12 am I doubt anyone on the staff every humored the idea of Kensuke or Hikari ever being Eva pilots. Sure all Shinji's class members were candidates but the crew didn't think "Kensuke would feature in this battle blah blah blah". It's just an idea the fans want and when they need to give people their fanservice it's time to pull out another "Oh, Hikari in her Orange Plugsuit pic". As for their involvement in the rest of Rebuild? I doubt if Hikari will have anything more than one line. Probably have the same amount of screentime she did in 1.0. Touji and Kensuke I figure will have one short sequence together either by themselves or they'll pull another "Phone Cameo" where they somehow reach Shinji by phone (if he gets out of Eva 01), get all emotional and then are swiftly cut off by the NERV Operator of DOOM.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Tue Nov 10, 2009 12:06 pm Any of the classmates piloting at this point is about as likely as a Scooby Doo ending.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Nov 10, 2009 2:23 pm It seems to be a law of anime physics that Kensuke never gets to pilot; though Hikari would be entirely free to do so. SaltyJoe wrote: as likely as a Scooby Doo ending.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Nov 10, 2009 2:53 pm jayngfet wrote: Actually every time Gainax needs a pikot they pull out Kensuke for 04, meaning at some point he WAS chosen, and the rules seem different if Asuka can make 03 work and Mari 02, and hey, at least one EVA we know nothing about, and 07 is MIA. The next two pilots to be chosen and next two EVA's, seems natural to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Ialdaboth » Tue Nov 10, 2009 9:55 pm Kensuke was chosen in an alternate universe where Rei is a bubbly, normal schoolgirl and Kaworu is apparently God and can control reality in any way he wants in order to fuck shotacon Shinji. I wouldn't take it very seriously.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Nov 10, 2009 10:18 pm Angelic Days, actually.

[]:             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Wed Nov 11, 2009 1:02 am I think they're dead. They evacuated into GeoFront and Rei destroyed most of it by using a N^2 missile. They could have been crushed under the rubble. But the least good thing to do is to wait as everybody else said.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Nov 11, 2009 12:19 pm Angelic days and a game we see him pilot but those are not really canon soo... Anyway, they are just background characters. Shinjis friends cause we know he needs them.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Nov 11, 2009 12:35 pm Supporting characters.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Nov 11, 2009 12:44 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: Angelic days and a game we see him pilot but those are not really canon soo... Anyway, they are just background characters. Shinjis friends cause we know he needs them.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Nov 11, 2009 1:20 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: Angelic days and a game we see him pilot but those are not really canon soo... Anyway, they are just background characters. Shinjis friends cause we know he needs them.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Nov 11, 2009 10:00 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: Angelic days and a game we see him pilot but those are not really canon soo... Anyway, they are just background characters. Shinjis friends cause we know he needs them.

[]:             Quote Post by Heromaster111 » Thu Nov 12, 2009 1:12 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: And in the actual GoS2 game, Eva-04 was still destroyed in that continuity so Kensuke's reduced to nothing but backup.

I'm wondering why they'd have been mentioned in rebuild then not used at all. It seems wierd to me that they do the whole of nothing so far, even less than their original role
